slides.visual_anchor: Right-side hero system object balanced by a left headline stack.

layout_rules: Make the hero object a primary zone, not a decorative accessory.
Reserve the left side for a disciplined headline stack and compact metadata.
Avoid introducing multiple secondary blocks that compete with the focal anchor.
alignment_rules: All text elements align to one left grid.
The hero object sits inside a stable right-side frame with controlled padding.
Metadata and signal labels should align with the headline grid, not float independently.
highlight_grammar: Keep the headline mostly neutral and high contrast.
Use accent color for small labels or orbital details.
Confine glow and gradient energy to the hero anchor zone.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Use a large right-side image or SVG anchor that immediately establishes premium visual weight.

slides.visual_anchor: Chapter card stack with dominant chapter emphasized.

layout_rules: Use one dominant chapter card on the left to establish narrative priority.
Stack supporting chapter cards on the right with consistent sizing.
Place a decision cue band at the bottom to frame the discussion outcome.
Maintain clear vertical rhythm between left dominant and right stack.
alignment_rules: Left dominant card and right stack must share the same top and bottom boundaries.
Right stack cards must have equal height and consistent internal padding.
Decision cue band must align to the full width of the content frame.
Chapter number labels align to a consistent left edge within each card.
highlight_grammar: Use accent color for chapter numbers and decision cue band.
Keep chapter titles in primary text color for readability.
Use secondary text color for subtitles or supporting descriptions.
Let card borders and shadows carry visual weight instead of color fills.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Narrative map pages should rely on typography and card structure, not hero images.

slides.visual_anchor: Oversized thesis statement plus lower-left grounding visual.

layout_rules: Give the thesis enough scale to drive the page before support evidence is read.
Use the right side for aligned support cards rather than equal-width content columns.
Place a true visual or structural object in the lower-left area to prevent top-heavy composition.
alignment_rules: Left and right columns must share the same content frame boundaries.
Support cards align to one vertical grid and consistent widths.
The bottom visual object must align to the left-column frame, not drift independently.
highlight_grammar: Oversized thesis with limited accent emphasis.
Signal labels on support cards instead of long subtitles.
Gradient or glow only in the grounding visual area.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Use a lower-left image or abstract SVG panel to ground the page and add impact.

slides.visual_anchor: Terminal window as the central trust object with layered security context.

layout_rules: Place the terminal window as the dominant visual anchor on the right side.
Use the left side for trust claims and governance labels, not dense text.
Layer subtle security indicators around the terminal without cluttering it.
Maintain clear separation between the terminal object and explanatory text.
alignment_rules: Terminal window must sit within a consistent right-side frame with controlled padding.
Left-side trust claims align to a shared vertical grid.
Security indicator layers must not overlap with terminal content area.
Governance labels align to the left edge of the terminal frame.
highlight_grammar: Use accent color for security indicators and trust badges.
Keep terminal content in monospace with syntax highlighting if applicable.
Use neutral colors for governance labels to avoid visual competition.
Apply subtle glow or border emphasis to the terminal frame only.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Use a terminal window SVG or screenshot as the right-side hero object. The terminal should show realistic command output or code that reinforces trust.

slides.visual_anchor: Layered stack with distinct visual separation between architectural layers.

layout_rules: Stack layers vertically with consistent spacing to show architectural hierarchy.
Use distinct visual treatment for each layer while maintaining cohesive stack appearance.
Place layer labels on the left with clear typography hierarchy.
Add connecting lines or subtle indicators to show layer relationships.
Reserve right side for layer details or cross-cutting concerns.
alignment_rules: All stack layers must share the same left and right boundaries.
Layer labels align to a consistent left grid.
Layer heights should be proportional to their architectural significance.
Spacing between layers must be uniform.
Right-side details align to the stack's right edge.
highlight_grammar: Use accent color for the most critical layer or active component.
Apply gradient or glow effects sparingly to emphasize layer boundaries.
Keep layer labels in high-contrast colors for readability.
Use subtle background variations to distinguish adjacent layers.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Architecture stack pages should rely on geometric shapes and typography rather than images.

slides.visual_anchor: Dominant summary block supported by a compact decision signal object.

layout_rules: Use one dominant takeaway block instead of multiple equal recap cards.
Add one secondary implication block and one compact signal cue only.
Keep the page low-density so the takeaway reads as intentional.
alignment_rules: Summary and implication blocks align to a shared left grid.
The signal cue must align to the same outer frame, even if it is visually smaller.
Do not let the compact cue float outside the established composition bounds.
highlight_grammar: Keep the main takeaway dominant and neutral.
Use accent color on the decision cue only.
Let contrast and spacing carry most of the hierarchy.

image_usage.placement_guidance: Optional subtle texture or accent object may be added, but the page should stand without a hero image.
